narrative:
Highland County has 27,016 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -13.2% D−R vs -33.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
